description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.23.0 Overall Look

• Breadcrumb navigation at the top stays visible — on any page, you'll always see the current location path (e.g., "Hanno > Bus > ...") fixed at the top, even when scrolling long pages. This also fixes the uncomfortable text shifting around iPhone's Dynamic Island and notch.

• "Myはんのう" logo added at the top — displayed in red and always visible. When you scroll, a small date (e.g., "5/22 (Fri)") appears next to the logo; tap it to jump back to the top.

• Large date numerals and garbage-collection clock numbers now use a digital clock font — styled like an alarm clock's 7-segment LCD display (DSEG7 Classic).

• Text size and color improved throughout — supporting text is slightly larger, and text that was too faint is now darker.

v1.23.0 Bus

• Timetable scrolling unified with page scrolling — previously only the timetable frame scrolled separately, making it harder to touch.

• Timetable header ("Departure Station / Destination / Current Time") now stays fixed at the top — you always see which timetable you're viewing while scrolling.

• "β version" label changed to "α version" with added warning banner — timetable data may contain errors or missing entries. Please check the official timetable from each bus operator as well.

v1.23.0 Favorite Shops / Events

• "Schedule" and "Map" links now appear as clear pill-shaped buttons — previously only small 📅 📍 icons made it hard to notice they were clickable. Now shows text like 📅 Schedule 📍 Map 📋 Details.

• Long URLs in event details now wrap properly — fixed the horizontal scrolling issue.

• Favorite shop search results use the same pill button format. Direct Google Maps links from shop names have been removed; instead use the 📍 Map pill.

v1.23.0 Garbage Collection

• "Details" for routes and "Change" for neighborhoods in the garbage section now use the same compact pill format as other sections.

v1.23.0 Other

• Added "Credits" footer — lists fonts used (DSEG / BIZ UDPGothic, both under SIL OFL license) and data sources.
